name: Shrimp Cakes-ha Behng
recipeInstructions:
1. Shell and devein the shrimp. Wash and drain them.
2. Chop the shrimp, jicama, green onion, barbecued pork or ham together until finely minced and well blended.
3. Combine the mixture with seasoning ingredients in a bowl.
4. Form the mixture into patties, each about 2 inches in diameter and 1/4 inch thick (approximately 20 patties).
5. Heat a frying pan with 3 tablespoons of oil. Fry the patties for about 7-8 minutes or until golden brown.
6. Remove from heat and keep warm.
7. Serve with chili sauce or sweet and sour sauce.
